use std::thread;
use std::time::Duration;

fn wait_for_ready() -> bool {
    std::path::Path::new("/tmp/ready").exists()
}

fn poll_until_ready() {
    loop {
        if wait_for_ready() {
            break;
        }
        thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(100));
    }
}

fn poll_with_fixed_sleep() {
    loop {
        match check_service_health() {
            Ok(()) => break,
            Err(_) => {
                thread::sleep(Duration::from_secs(1));
            }
        }
    }
}

async fn async_poll_loop() {
    loop {
        let status = fetch_status().await;
        if status == "ready" {
            break;
        }
        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(500)).await;
    }
}

fn check_service_health() -> Result<(), ()> { Err(()) }
async fn fetch_status() -> String { "pending".into() }

fn main() {
    poll_until_ready();
}
